# `.github/` Directory Overview

This directory contains GitHub automation workflows, issue reporting forms, pull request checklists, and repository governance configs.

## 📂 Contents

- **`workflows/`**:
  - `deploy.yml`: Production GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline (Build, Dockerize, Publish GHCR, SSH EC2 Deploy).
  - `diagnose.yml`: Automated diagnostic workflow checking environment secrets and build sanity.
- **`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`**: Form-based YAML templates for Bug Reports, Feature Requests, Documentation, AI Improvements, and Performance Issues.
- **`PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`**: Checklist and template for community PR submissions.
